ECOTOX effect-code pMoA inference — DIAGNOSTIC (negative result).
most-sensitive sublethal endpoint != pMoA: the DEB kappa-cascade makes
reproduction win for almost any stress. See script headers.

===== Cadmium   [a priori: maintenance(table)] =====
axis          n_chron med_chronic_ugL n_acute med_acute_ugL
assimilation  0       -               1       6450.0
maintenance   28      42.9            3       71.0
growth        15      9.6             6       780.0
reproduction  23      19.0            7       220.0
survival      36      18.5            520     1800.0
  --> most-sensitive sublethal axis (chronic) = GROWTH   (confounded — see header)

survival      177     55.1            1024    87.1
  --> most-sensitive sublethal axis (chronic) = REPRODUCTION   (confounded — see header)
